creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
So the original kernel is the GENERIC kernel delivered by 6.2? And the new
kernel that fails is a GENERIC KERNEL with ATAPICAM added?
-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
